summary: Iteration 5 testing - AI Studio rebranding + ws-token + webhook + voice_call node. All backend tests passed (5/5). Frontend UI tests confirmed all rebranding changes and new features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Webhook payload requires all 4 fields (numero_cliente, sessionId, mensagem_cliente, url_envio) to reach the ObjectId validation logic. If tested with incomplete payload, Pydantic 422 fires first - this is by design.
Settings 'Não configurado — modo simulado' badge only appears when n8n is NOT configured. Admin account has n8n configured so badge shows 'Configurado' - correct behavior.
Integrations empty-state subtitle 'Conecte suas ferramentas e serviços externos' only shows when 0 integrations exist. Admin has 1 integration, so text is hidden - correct behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 complete. All rebranding checks verified: Login (subtitle 'by AI Studio', placeholder 'seu@email.com', tagline, demo hint), Sidebar ('AI Studio' subtitle), Settings (Stack & Arquitetura dev-only, Motor de Execução de Agentes, URL do Servidor de Execução, Salvar configuração), AgentBuilder (CRM Clickmassa, Chamada de Voz in palette), NodePanel voice_call (Rótulo, Número de Destino, Script de Abertura, Provedor select), Integrations (CRM Clickmassa first option, credential hint). Backend: ws-token GET /api/workspace/ws-token returns {ws_token, expires_in:60}, webhook returns 400 for invalid ObjectId and 404 for nonexistent tenant, n8n_translator has voice_call mapped to httpRequest, AgentRun startExecution is async and calls /workspace/ws-token before WS connect.
mocked_apis: voice_call node execution (stub only) and n8n workflow execution (simulated if no credentials) are MOCKED
